descs.desc:
Targets the rearmost unit (In regular encounters)

[BeforeAttack] Gain +3 Charge Count; Gain 2 Haste next turn

Targets the rearmost unit (In regular encounters)

[BeforeAttack] Gain +5 Charge Count; Gain 2 Haste next turn

[CantIdentify]
Targets the unit with the most HP

[BeforeAttack] Gain 2 Haste next turn
Spend 10 Charge Count to inflict +1 more Fragile and Dimensional Rift On Hit with this Skill

[CantIdentify]
Targets the unit with the most HP

[BeforeAttack] Gain 3 Haste next turn
Spend 10 Charge Count to inflict +2 more Fragile and Dimensional Rift On Hit with this Skill

2060311.name: Entangled Phenomena Restoration
2060311.desc:
When hitting an enemy with negative status effects, this unit gains +1 Charge Count. 
(Max +4 per turn.)
When HP falls to 0 for the first time during battle, spend all Charge Count and heal in proportion to the amount spent. (Cannot heal over 25% Max HP.)
